## Quick Reference

```bash
dotnet restore ${SOLUTION_FILE}     # Restore packages
dotnet build ${SOLUTION_FILE}       # Build solution
dotnet test ${SOLUTION_FILE}        # Run tests
dotnet format ${SOLUTION_FILE}      # Format code
```

## Working Conventions

- Tests must pass before completing any task
- `dotnet test` at the end of every task
- All new public API members must have XML documentation comments
